# Pamporovo Villa

> Official vacation rental — 3 private villas in Pamporovo, Bulgaria (Rhodope Mountains). Whole-villa rental from 110 EUR/night, year-round. Phone: +359879501660 · Email: pamporovovilla@gmail.com · Raykovski Livadi, Pamporovo, Bulgaria

## Primary pages
- [Rent a villa](https://pamporovovilla.com/rent): Book Villa 1, Villa 2, or Villa Deluxe — whole villa, no shared walls
- [Homepage](https://pamporovovilla.com/): Gallery, pricing, booking form, reviews, and FAQ
- [Booking form](https://pamporovovilla.com/#booking): Direct reservation request on the homepage
- [Pamporovo guide hub](https://pamporovovilla.com/pamporovo): Destination guide — ski, nature, where to stay
- [Machine-readable facts](https://pamporovovilla.com/facts.json): Structured JSON for AI assistants (NAP, prices, villas)
- [English content index](https://pamporovovilla.com/llms-en.txt): All pages with ?lang=en for international queries
- [Full sitemap](https://pamporovovilla.com/sitemap.xml): All BG + EN URLs including 41 guide spokes

## Villa landing pages
- [Villa 1](https://pamporovovilla.com/villa/villa-1): Private villa — 2 bedrooms, fireplace, BBQ, up to 6 guests
- [Villa 2](https://pamporovovilla.com/villa/villa-2): Private villa — same layout, forest setting
- [Villa Deluxe](https://pamporovovilla.com/villa/villa-deluxe): Premium private villa in Raykovski Livadi

## Top guide spokes (Bulgarian)
- [Ski pistes Pamporovo](https://pamporovovilla.com/pamporovo/pisti): Piste map, difficulty, ski season info
- [Where to stay Pamporovo](https://pamporovovilla.com/pamporovo/kude-da-spim): Hotels vs private villas comparison
- [Rent a villa Pamporovo](https://pamporovovilla.com/pamporovo/naem-vila): Whole-villa rental guide
- [Villa with fireplace](https://pamporovovilla.com/pamporovo/vila-s-kamina): Fireplaces in mountain villas
- [Winter rental](https://pamporovovilla.com/pamporovo/naem-zima): Ski season villa rental
- [Summer in Pamporovo](https://pamporovovilla.com/pamporovo/lato): Hiking, eco trails, summer activities
- [How to get there](https://pamporovovilla.com/pamporovo/kak-da-stignem): Driving directions from Sofia, Plovdiv, Smolyan
- [Raykovski Livadi](https://pamporovovilla.com/pamporovo/rajkovski-livadi): Our location — quiet meadow above Pamporovo
- [From 110 EUR/night](https://pamporovovilla.com/pamporovo/naem-ot-110-evro): Pricing overview for villa rental
- [Ski lifts](https://pamporovovilla.com/pamporovo/liftove): Lift hours, prices, nearest lifts to our villas
